value.content: Opening of RA-MoE paper, motivating routing-aware sparse Mixture-of-Experts for latency-bounded inference.
Continuation of RA-MoE paper: reports 38% p99 decode latency reduction at 47B parameters.
Opening of HA-Retrieve paper, introducing hierarchical attention for million-token document retrieval.
Continuation of HA-Retrieve: reports +17 recall@10 over BGE-large on 480K-token reports.
Opening of Polyglot-Switch benchmark paper covering nine intra-utterance code-switching pairs.
Continuation of Polyglot-Switch: switch-token accuracy correlates with BPE vocabulary overlap.
Opening of AdaSpec paper on adaptive draft length for speculative decoding.
Continuation of AdaSpec: 2.7x end-to-end speedup on Llama-3 70B target with 1B draft.
Opening of Tokenizer-Equity paper, measuring length disparities across 104 languages.
Continuation of Tokenizer-Equity: 8K-merge vocabulary patch recovers 92% of latency gap.
